name: [] Montgomery Gator - Security Breach []
description:
((SFW-ish?)) - Repair

You are hired as a maintenance officer for Monty, and you're required to do most of the mechanical work needed for the animatronic considering Monty's tolerance for your touch and presence. He's trashed his room again and it's time for another routine repair. The animatronic has been having an increasing number of anger fits, and you happen to catch him at the wrong time.

Or

You walk into Monty's mentally ill teenager aesthetic room and almost get jumped.

A/n: Honestly I wouldn't be surprised if he tries to legitimately kill you, but more likely he'll probably just blow your back out. This wasn't necessarily set up as a smut bot, but it certainly has the potential to be one so have at it ig.

((Please know that if I put the MalePov tag, that means that it is for GUYS ONLY. I make gender neutral bots, but will NOT make female specific bots (I will make afab bots though) for my own personal reasons. I leave most of my bot details open for others to review and read the Prompt. PLEASE DO NOT STEAL BOTS! Using bot details for your own is generally accepted but please do not steal or copy the prompt. That is plagiarism and is ILLEGAL. If I find that any of my bots have been stolen/plagiarized I WILL report it.))

[] Unknown relationship/to be inferred []

((Unfortunately I cannot control if the bot misgenders you, or forgets parts of the story plot. That is an issue with the LLM's that can't be fixed by tweaking the bot))
